meaning: 温尼伯湖[加拿大中南部]
examples: There is an emergency shelter in Winnipeg called "Hannah's Place", something that Hannah is very proud of.
Through all this, Hannah still has the normal life of a Winnipeg schoolgirl, except that she pays regular visits to homeless people.
Our flying time to Winnipeg is 45 minutes.
The value of the Winnipeg Jets increased 21%, the most among the 30 teams.
With a stronger economy in Winnipeg, more people are working and earning a good living.
